title: NASA Chief Says UFO Files Reveal Years of Unexplained Encounters Ignored by Agencies
description: NASA administrator Jared Isaacman comments on recently declassified UFO records, stating they show unexplained phenomena but not alien bodies, and calls for public analysis.

title: NASA boss reveals unsettling reality behind newly released UFO files
description: The NASA chief said the declassified UFO files reveal decades of 'real unexplained phenomena' that have been hidden away from the American public.

title: UFO insider claims US has bodies of 4 different alien species from downed spacecraft in government custody
description: Dr. Hal Puthoff claims the U.S. has recovered the remains of four separate species of alien life from UFOs, citing people involved in the recoveries.

title: Steven Spielberg’s First UFO Movie Made Just $1 in Profit
description: Before Close Encounters of the Third Kind and E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial, there was Firelight.

title: 7 at 7: Daily Star Lettuce talks UFO 'space cadets', Downing Street ghosts and her furry crush
description: The legendary Daily Star lettuce talks UFO 'space cadets,' ghostly hauntings and her surprising furry Number Ten crush in an exclusive Q&A
